notes: Synchronous IPC handler hotspot_ready (tag=app). Entry 0x14026def0 is real body (847 bytes), not shim/drop_in_place — confirmed via entity_query name=hotspot_ready_owner_sys. No async state machine. Called by auto_switch_multiplex_dispatcher_sys@0x1402663e0. Logic: reads current usage refresh interval via get_usage_refresh_interval_core_read; if interval discriminant==3 (error/unset) branches to hotspot_ready_state_check_sys for side-effect path (focus_main_window_dispatch_sys dispatch); if interval discriminant!=3 resolves IPC directly via tauri_ipc_resolve_sys with hotspot combined state data. Response DTO: copies input struct fields (520+400 bytes combined state) into IPC resolve envelope. Side effect: conditionally dispatches focus_main_window via focus_main_window_dispatch_sys@0x140638240 if hotspot state check fails condition (discriminant!=18). Mac equivalent is query-only; Win is query+conditional focus-dispatch.
